nasb.text: Then the king faced about and blessed all the assembly of Israel, while all the assembly of Israel was standing.

esv.text: Then the king turned around and blessed all the assembly of Israel, while all the assembly of Israel stood.

cnv.text: 於是王把臉轉過來，為全體以色列會眾祝福，全體以色列會眾都站著。

ccb.text: 然后，王转身为站立在那里的以色列民众祝福，
